title: gochnatia angustifolia
intro: Gochnatia angustifolia, also known as the Chilte, is a plant species native to the Andean region of South America, particularly in Argentina, Chile, and Peru. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Gochnatia angustifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even help to lower blood pressure. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have also been used in herbal remedies to treat various ailments.
